Home › Programmes › Certificate in Assistant Nursing
Certificate Programme

Certificate in
Assistant Nursing

The Certificate in Assistant Nursing from DIT is one of Malaysia's most reputed qualifications, approved by the Malaysian Nursing Board (Lembaga Jururawat Malaysia). DIT has maintained an all-time high of 100% passing rate for the Nursing Assistant Registry Examination, which is compulsory for all graduates.

2 Years (Full Time) Intake: May & September
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Code: CAN MQA: FA4528 MOHE: R2/723/3/0091 Local / Malaysian Only

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years Excellence — Affiliated with Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Entry Requirements

Pass SPM with Credit in Bahasa Melayu; AND
Pass in General Science / Biology / Chemistry / Physics
Pass in Mathematics (Elementary, Additional or Modern)
Pass in English

About This Programme

The Certificate in Assistant Nursing from DIT is one of Malaysia's most reputed qualifications, approved by the Malaysian Nursing Board (Lembaga Jururawat Malaysia). DIT has maintained an all-time high of 100% passing rate for the Nursing Assistant Registry Examination, which is compulsory for all graduates.

Course Modules

1Year 1 – Technical Knowledge

  • AMNS 1112 – Anatomy and Physiology I
  • AMNS 1122 – Anatomy and Physiology II
  • ANNS 1113 – Principals and Practical of Nursing
  • ANMS 1132 – Microbiology and Parasitology
  • ANNS 1223 – Medical / Surgical I
  • ANNS 1232 – Medical / Surgical II

1Year 1 – Professional Knowledge

  • ANBS 1113 – Communications, Public Relations and Professional Development; Law and Ethics in Nursing
  • MPU 1212 – Communicative English

1Year 1 – Clinical Attachments

  • ANCP 1116 & ANCP 1218 – Clinical Placement

2Year 2 – Technical Knowledge

  • ANNS 2132 – Medical / Surgical III
  • ANNS 2143 – Medical / Surgical IV
  • ANNS 2262 – Communicable Diseases
  • ANNS 2273 – Maternal and Child
  • ANBS 2132 – Basic Concepts of Sociology and Psychology

2Year 2 – Professional Knowledge

  • MPU 1312 – Perlembagaan & Masyarakat Malaysia
  • MPU 1153 – Pengajian Malaysia

2Year 2 – Clinical Attachments

  • ANCP 2137 & ANCP 2248 – Clinical Placements

Career Prospects

Assistant or Registered NurseNurse ResearcherPatient Care at Old Folks HomesNurse Informaticist

Future Education Pathways

→Certificate → Diploma in Nursing
→Diploma → Bachelors of Science in Nursing
→BSN → Masters of Science in Nursing
